briefdescription.para: This function handles a standard device request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is a pointer to the data structure containing the setup request.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a vendor request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is a pointer to the data structure containing the setup request.

simplesect.para: This function is a template to handle vendor request for control IN and control OUT endpoints. The control OUT endpoint can receive only 64 bytes of data per dTD. For receiving more than 64 bytes of vendor data on control OUT endpoint, change the buffer size of the control OUT endpoint. Otherwise the results are unexpected.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
SetupData
is the setup packet received from Host.
None. This function is called by Chapter9 handler when class request is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup data structure containing the setup request.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the device descriptor for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Usb_DevData instance.
is pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the configuration descriptor for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Usb_DevData instance.
is the pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a string descriptor for the given index.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Usb_DevData instance.
is a pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.
is the index of the string for which the descriptor is requested.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the buffer that is to be filled with the descriptor.
is the size of the provided buffer.
is the index of the string for which the descriptor is requested.

simplesect.para: Length of the descriptor in the buffer on success. 0 on error.

briefdescription.para: Changes State of Core to USB configured State.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the Usb_DevData instance.
Ctrl
is a pointer to the Setup packet data.
XST_SUCCESS else XST_FAILURE
None. Changes State of Core to USB configured State.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the Index of the desired configuration.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when SET_CONFIGURATION command is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is the setup packet received from Host.

simplesect.para: Non control endpoints must be enabled after SET_CONFIGURATION command since hardware clears all previously enabled endpoints except control endpoints when this command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup packet received from Host.

simplesect.para: Non control endpoints must be enabled after SET_CONFIGURATION command since hardware clears all previously enabled endpoints except control endpoints when this command is received.

briefdescription.para: This function is called by Chapter9 handler when SET_CONFIGURATION command or SET_INTERFACE command is received from Host.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
is the setup packet received from Host.

simplesect.para: Non control endpoints must be enabled after SET_INTERFACE command since hardware clears all previously enabled endpoints except control endpoints when this command is received.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the setup packet received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This function handles a Setup Data packet from the host.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to XUsbPs instance of the controller.
is the structure containing the setup request.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the function is successful.

simplesect.para: None.

parameterdescription.para: is a private member of Usb_DevData instance.
is the config value.

simplesect.para: None.
None.

parameterdescription.para: is a private member of Usb_DevData instance.

simplesect.para: Current configuration value
None.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the chapter 9 code for the example.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a jz 10/10/10 First release 1.04a nm 02/05/13 Fixed CR# 696550. Added template code for Vendor request. 1.04a nm 03/04/13 Fixed CR# 704022. Implemented TEST_MODE Feature. 1.06a kpc 11/11/13 Always use global memory for dma operations 2.1 kpc 4/29/14 Align dma buffers to cache line boundary 2.4 vak 4/01/19 Fixed IAR data_alignment warnings 2.9 nd 3/18/24 Fixed failures reported by CV test suite. 2.10 ka 21/08/25 Fixed GCC warnings 2.11 ka 24/12/25 Fix EP0 STALL handling for invalid descriptor requests *
